# Manage ads from an AI agent with Meta ads AI connectors

![](https://static.xx.fbcdn.net/mci_ab/public/cms/?ab_b=e&ab_page=CMS&ab_entry=438223955063449&version=1666716831&transcode_extension=webp)

You may not have access to this feature and/or all its tools yet.

You can create, manage and analyze Meta ads in your preferred AI interface, using natural language. Meta ads AI connectors, enabled by our ads model context protocol (MCP) server and ads command line interface (CLI), securely connect a conversational AI agent to your Meta ad account with all its context. This helps the agent make recommendations and take actions grounded in your unique account data.

**Note**: This article focuses on the ads MCP server. For more information on CLI, please refer to the [developer blog](https://developers.facebook.com/blog/post/2026/04/29/introducing-ads-cli) and [resources](https://developers.facebook.com/documentation/ads-commerce/ads-ai-connectors/ads-cli/ads-cli-overview).

When you use the ads MCP server, it can help you with:

- **Comprehensive Reporting:** The agent can gain valuable insights and pull detailed reporting to better understand campaign performance.

- **Ad Creation & Management:** The agent can create and edit ads, ad sets, and campaigns.

- **Catalog Creation & Management:** The agent can create a catalog and add product data, and efficiently troubleshoot data feed and item visibility issues.

- **Signal Diagnostics:** The agent can access signal health and quality information, providing insights into where you should prioritize investment in your signals setup.

- **Help & Troubleshooting:** The agent can execute a search of Meta Business Help Center articles relevant to a query.

- **A/B Tests & Conversion Lift Studies:** The agent can create and manage A/B tests and conversion lift studies as well as retrieve details on existing tests/studies.

- **Activity Logs:** Get visibility into activity log changes for an ad account, mirroring the Ads Manager campaign history page.

- **And More:** Simply ask your AI agent what tools are available to get a full picture.


You will have write capabilities (meaning the AI agent can both pull information and perform actions) for ad creation & management and catalog creation & management tools. **Note:** Any actions taken will require your authorization through the AI agent.

## How to set up Meta ads AI connectors

Integrating with the Meta ads AI connectors depends on the AI platform you use. Follow the instructions provided by the agent you’d like to integrate with. Below you can find resources from currently supported AI agents.

- [ChatGPT](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fdevelopers.openai.com%2Fapi%2Fdocs%2Fguides%2Fdeveloper-mode&h=AUAxuYQj5iKOwnrY9yzzB27EgmtF27m6-jfAwbmNBDOMuIJo5e6B7Ng5GFJqjnaRYVvUeehQiS8uje3vii91blfyFg3qJkZNe4pOHM0rB7BDcw4FDs6iTDVUSskQQyELrpqLXKtM-ynhxA)

- [Claude](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsupport.claude.com%2Fen%2Farticles%2F11175166-get-started-with-custom-connectors-using-remote-mcp&h=AUBvIvSZvxL15N8axCEWVQoQ_a5KIQxZBJeWz42LqHlnfozq7IrY6xA2EPJAIaDOLjNFAKvKXIq9TeMNRtKIYi4wKyHgfM_aRdb8udFEWxJpKltN0hUtX_sOP6-mTMxGgebEYnlNkIl6kQ)

- [Claude Code](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcode.claude.com%2Fdocs%2Fen%2Fmcp%23option-1-add-a-remote-http-server&h=AUB2QbdKpGiwB5wQSEPNLuQTeTjBuw_PBfyjqs6aaI856LFfcu8ikHg7X-2lMp5HIay7uPR5Y6uaKvTTUVgsbdO1u8kl1HdD7bvDQv3m0T5Gq2PdmW2sjH-tA3c4RShzSiihYRG_h0yTNQ)

- [Perplexity](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.perplexity.ai%2Fhelp-center%2Fen%2Farticles%2F13915507-adding-custom-remote-connectors&h=AUAxY6CDGagyvqxO_yQq_C9KQaALekcgyHbRczECjVWCR-Ci9LOs8uSmDe8m3Iulj543hIe7txFCuef0aA0QNOhHXF2Bh54-NHx8FuE2ARDx5O0O0wHFkOKTfaIvoy-EY8_8xx427p79zA)


The remote MCP server URL for our ads MCP server across all currently supported AI agents is:

https://mcp.facebook.com/ads

## About MCP servers

An MCP server acts as a bridge between an AI agent and external systems, such as databases or APIs, translating their response into a format that the agent can understand. This enables you to extend what an agent can do, allowing it to retrieve data, take actions and interact with third-party tools on your behalf.

## Get the latest updates from Meta for Business.

Provide your email address to receive the latest updates from Meta for Business, including news, events and product updates.

By submitting this form, you agree to receive marketing related electronic communications from Meta, including news, events, updates and promotional emails. You may withdraw your consent and unsubscribe from these at any time, for example, by clicking the unsubscribe link included on our emails.
